heading: Safety award and promotional materials
label: 569d Safety award and promotional materials
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 3 of Pub. L. 102–580section 2201 of this title

children.heading: Procurement of promotional materials
children.label: 1 Procurement of promotional materials
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to procure materials that, in the judgment of the Secretary, are necessary to promote the Corps of Engineers safety program.

children.heading: Distribution of materials to employees
children.label: 2 Distribution of materials to employees
children.text: The items purchased pursuant to this subsection shall be distributed to employees of the Corps of Engineers to advance the goals of the safety program.

children.heading: Employee recognition
children.label: b Employee recognition
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to incur necessary expenses for the honorary recognition of the outstanding safety performance of employees of the Corps of Engineers. Such recognition may be in the form of certificates, plaques, cash, or other forms of awards.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated $350,000 for each fiscal year beginning after , for carrying out the purposes of this section.September 30, 1992
